name: Pork Chops Smothered & Cabbage
recipeIngredient: 8 cups coarsely shredded red cabbage (about 1-1/2 pounds)
1/4 cup red wine vinegar or cider vinegar
6 pork rib or loin chops, 3/4 inch thick (about 1-1/2 pounds)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover and cook all ingredients except pork chops, cranberry juice, and parsley in a Dutch oven over medium heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
2. Reduce the heat to medium-low. Cook for an additional 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Trim any excess fat from the pork chops.
4. Stir the cranberry juice into the cabbage mixture; add the pork chops.
5. Heat until boiling, then reduce the heat. Cover and simmer about 45 minutes or until the pork is tender.
6. Remove the bay leaf. Serve the cabbage over the pork chops and sprinkle with parsley.
6 servings
